name: Brillia Eau de Parfum
short: A luminous amber eau de parfum that exudes sophistication and timeless elegance.
description: Brillia is a luminous amber eau de parfum that opens with a bright flash of bergamot and pink pepper, blooms into a heart of jasmine and orange blossom, and settles into a warm, golden base of amber, vanilla, and sandalwood. Composed at high concentration for an intimate, lasting sillage. Hand-filled and finished in our Udaipur atelier, each 100ml flacon is weighted with a brass-tone cap. A scent for those who carry their own light.
benefits: Luminous amber composition with floral heart
Weighted glass flacon with brass-tone cap
usage: Spritz onto pulse points — wrists, neck, behind the ears — from a distance of 6 inches. Do not rub. Reapply as desired. A versatile signature scent for day or evening.
